headline: Can One Realty Income Position Generate $33,000 a Year in Retirement?
summary: A 70-year-old retiree seeking approximately $33,000 in annual portfolio income could generate that cash flow from a single position in Realty Income (NYSE:O). With shares trading around $59.55 and a monthly dividend of $0.2705 per share, a $600,000 investment would produce roughly $2,750 per month in dividend income, paid on a monthly schedule. For many ... Can One Realty Income Position Generate $33,000 a Year in Retirement?
